response.overview: NEVER AGAIN (Short film ) -an award winning Canadian film by SANGHA MOTION PICTURES. Official selection - Miami Independent International Film festival, Best Global Shorts,IFFSA Toronto, Moody Crab International  Film Festival etc. A Canadian film depicting problems of broken immigrant families and a single mother's struggle to pull out her son from drug addiction.
response.tagline: A Canadian film depicting problems of broken immigrant families and a single mother's struggle to pull out her son from drug addiction.
response.title: Never Again
